en: When the people saw that Moses delayed to come down from the mountain, the people gathered themselves together to Aaron and said to him, "Up, make us gods who shall go before us. As for this Moses, the man who brought us up out of the land of Egypt, we do not know what has become of him."
zh: 人民見摩西遲遲不下山，就聚集到亞倫那裡去，對他說：“起來，為我們做神像可以走在我們前頭領路，因為那摩西，就是把我們從埃及地領出來的那個人，我們不知道他遭遇了甚麼事。”

en: So Aaron said to them, "Take off the rings of gold that are in the ears of your wives, your sons, and your daughters, and bring them to me."
zh: 亞倫對他們說：“把你們妻子和兒女戴在耳上的金環摘下來，送來給我。”

en: So all the people took off the rings of gold that were in their ears and brought them to Aaron.
zh: 全體人民就把他們耳上的金耳環都摘下來，送來給亞倫。

en: And he received the gold from their hand and fashioned it with a graving tool and made a golden calf. And they said, "These are your gods, O Israel, who brought you up out of the land of Egypt!"
zh: 亞倫從他們手中接過來，用雕刻的工具雕刻，鑄造了一個牛像；他們就說：“以色列啊，這就是你們的神，就是把你從埃及地領出來的那位。”

en: When Aaron saw this, he built an altar before it. And Aaron made proclamation and said, "Tomorrow shall be a feast to the LORD."
zh: 亞倫看見了，就在牛像面前築了一座祭壇，並且宣告，說：“明日是耶和華的節日。”

en: And they rose up early the next day and offered burnt offerings and brought peace offerings. And the people sat down to eat and drink and rose up to play.
zh: 次日清早，人民起來，就獻上了燔祭，也帶來了平安祭；然後他們坐下吃喝，起來玩樂。

en: And the LORD said to Moses, "Go down, for your people, whom you brought up out of the land of Egypt, have corrupted themselves.
zh: 耶和華對摩西說：“你下山去吧，因為你的人民，就是你從埃及地領出來的，已經敗壞了。

en: They have turned aside quickly out of the way that I commanded them. They have made for themselves a golden calf and have worshiped it and sacrificed to it and said, 'These are your gods, O Israel, who brought you up out of the land of Egypt!'"
zh: 他們很快就偏離了我吩咐他們的道路，為自己鑄造了一個牛像，向它跪拜，向它獻祭，說：‘以色列啊，這就是你的神，就是把你從埃及地領出來的那位。’”

en: And the LORD said to Moses, "I have seen this people, and behold, it is a stiff-necked people.
zh: 耶和華對摩西說：“我看這人民，真是硬著頸項的人民。

en: Now therefore let me alone, that my wrath may burn hot against them and I may consume them, in order that I may make a great nation of you."
zh: 現在，你且由得我，讓我向他們發烈怒，把他們消滅；我要使你成為大國。”

en: But Moses implored the LORD his God and said, "O LORD, why does your wrath burn hot against your people, whom you have brought out of the land of Egypt with great power and with a mighty hand?
zh: 摩西就懇求耶和華他的 神施恩，說：“耶和華啊，你為甚麼向你的人民發烈怒呢？這人民是你用大能和全能的手從埃及地領出來的。

en: Why should the Egyptians say, 'With evil intent did he bring them out, to kill them in the mountains and to consume them from the face of the earth'? Turn from your burning anger and relent from this disaster against your people.
zh: 為甚麼讓埃及人議論，說：‘把他們領出來是出於惡意的，要在山上殺死他們，在地上消滅他們’呢？求你回心轉意，不發烈怒；求你改變初衷，不降禍給你的人民。

en: Remember Abraham, Isaac, and Israel, your servants, to whom you swore by your own self, and said to them, 'I will multiply your offspring as the stars of heaven, and all this land that I have promised I will give to your offspring, and they shall inherit it forever.'"
zh: 求你記念你的僕人亞伯拉罕、以撒、雅各；你曾經指著自己向他們起誓，說：‘我必使你的後裔增多，好像天上的星一樣；我必把我應許的這全地賜給你的後裔，他們必永遠承受這地作產業。’”

en: And the LORD relented from the disaster that he had spoken of bringing on his people.
zh: 於是，耶和華改變初衷，不把他所說的禍降在他的人民身上。

en: Then Moses turned and went down from the mountain with the two tablets of the testimony in his hand, tablets that were written on both sides; on the front and on the back they were written.
zh: 摩西轉身，從山上下來，手裡拿著兩塊法版；法版是兩面寫的，這面和那面都寫著字。

en: The tablets were the work of God, and the writing was the writing of God, engraved on the tablets.
zh: 法版是 神的工作，字是 神寫的，刻在法版上。

en: When Joshua heard the noise of the people as they shouted, he said to Moses, "There is a noise of war in the camp."
zh: 約書亞聽見人民呼喊的聲音的時候，就對摩西說：“營裡有戰爭的聲音。”

en: But he said, "It is not the sound of shouting for victory, or the sound of the cry of defeat, but the sound of singing that I hear."
zh: 摩西回答： “這不是戰勝的呼聲， 也不是戰敗的呼聲； 我聽見的是歌唱的聲音。”

en: And as soon as he came near the camp and saw the calf and the dancing, Moses' anger burned hot, and he threw the tablets out of his hands and broke them at the foot of the mountain.
zh: 摩西走近營前的時候，看見了那牛犢，又看見了有人唱歌跳舞，他就發烈怒，把兩塊法版從他的手中摔掉，在山下把它們摔碎了。

en: He took the calf that they had made and burned it with fire and ground it to powder and scattered it on the water and made the people of Israel drink it.
zh: 又把他們所做的那牛犢拿過來，用火焚燒，磨到粉碎，撒在水面上，讓以色列人喝。

en: And Moses said to Aaron, "What did this people do to you that you have brought such a great sin upon them?"
zh: 摩西對亞倫說：“這人民向你作了甚麼，你竟使他們陷在大罪裡呢？”

en: And Aaron said, "Let not the anger of my lord burn hot. You know the people, that they are set on evil.
zh: 亞倫回答：“求我主不要發烈怒，你知道這人民傾向罪惡。

en: For they said to me, 'Make us gods who shall go before us. As for this Moses, the man who brought us up out of the land of Egypt, we do not know what has become of him.'
zh: 他們對我說：‘給我們做神像，可以在我們前面引路，因為那摩西，就是把我們從埃及地領出來的那個人，我們不知道他遭遇了甚麼事。’

en: So I said to them, 'Let any who have gold take it off.' So they gave it to me, and I threw it into the fire, and out came this calf."
zh: 我對他們說：‘凡是有金子的，都可以摘下來’，他們就給了我；我把它丟在火裡，這牛犢就出來了。”

en: And when Moses saw that the people had broken loose (for Aaron had let them break loose, to the derision of their enemies),
zh: 摩西看見人民放肆原來是亞倫縱容他們，使他們成為那些起來與他們為敵的人的笑柄，

en: then Moses stood in the gate of the camp and said, "Who is on the LORD's side? Come to me." And all the sons of Levi gathered around him.
zh: 就站在營門中，說：“凡是屬耶和華的，都可以到我這裡來。”於是，所有利未的子孫都到他那裡聚集。

en: And he said to them, "Thus says the LORD God of Israel, 'Put your sword on your side each of you, and go to and fro from gate to gate throughout the camp, and each of you kill his brother and his companion and his neighbor.'"
zh: 摩西對他們說：“耶和華以色列的 神這樣說：‘你們各人要把自己的劍佩在大腿上，在營中往來行走，從這門到那門；你們各人要殺自己的兄弟、鄰舍和親人。’”

en: And the sons of Levi did according to the word of Moses. And that day about three thousand men of the people fell.
zh: 利未的子孫照著摩西的話作了；那一天，人民中被殺的約有三千人。

en: And Moses said, "Today you have been ordained for the service of the LORD, each one at the cost of his son and of his brother, so that he might bestow a blessing upon you this day."
zh: 摩西說：“今天你們要奉獻自己歸耶和華為聖，因為各人犧牲了自己的兒子和兄弟，好使耶和華今天賜福給你們。”

en: The next day Moses said to the people, "You have sinned a great sin. And now I will go up to the LORD; perhaps I can make atonement for your sin."
zh: 第二天，摩西對人民說：“你們犯了大罪，現在我要上耶和華那裡去，或者我可以為你們贖罪。”

en: So Moses returned to the LORD and said, "Alas, this people have sinned a great sin. They have made for themselves gods of gold.
zh: 於是，摩西回到耶和華那裡，說：“唉，這人民犯了大罪，為自己做了金神像。

en: But now, if you will forgive their sin- but if not, please blot me out of your book that you have written."
zh: 現在，如果你肯赦免他們的罪，那就好了；如果不肯，求你從你所寫的冊上把我塗抹吧。”

en: But the LORD said to Moses, "Whoever has sinned against me, I will blot out of my book.
zh: 耶和華對摩西說：“誰得罪了我，我就要從我的冊上把誰塗抹。

en: But now go, lead the people to the place about which I have spoken to you; behold, my angel shall go before you. Nevertheless, in the day when I visit, I will visit their sin upon them."
zh: 現在你去吧，領這人民到我吩咐你的地方去。看哪，我的使者必在你前面引路；只是在我追討的日子，我必追討他們的罪。”

en: Then the LORD sent a plague on the people, because they made the calf, the one that Aaron made.
zh: 耶和華擊殺人民是因為他們敬拜亞倫做的牛犢。
